description_long: This is a vintage-style school bus with a predominantly white body accented by a broad red stripe running horizontally along its sides. The bus features large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, with visible signs of rust and weathering, especially around the wheel wells and lower panels. The front of the bus has a rounded design with a wide windshield, two side mirrors, and a simple grille with a central emblem. The rear of the bus includes two large windows, a license plate, and additional rust marks, but no visible emergency exit door. The wheels are dark and robust, and the roof is slightly curved with several small rooftop fixtures. The overall appearance suggests an older, well-used vehicle, likely made primarily of metal with glass windows and rubber tires.
description: A weathered, vintage school bus with a white and red color scheme, large rectangular windows, and visible rust patches. The bus has a rounded front, simple grille, and robust wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, wide windshield, two side mirrors, and a simple grille with a central emblem.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long row of large rectangular windows, red stripe, and significant rust patches along the lower panels.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large windows, a license plate, and visible rust, but no emergency exit door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement, red stripe, and rust, as well as the front entry door near the front wheel.
attribute_school_bus_signage: No visible 'SCHOOL BUS' text or specific school bus signage; exterior markings are limited to red stripes and some rust patches.
attribute_front_grille_design: The front grille is small, rectangular, and located centrally below the windshield, featuring a simple horizontal slat pattern and a central emblem; it is colored in a dark tone matching the bumper.
attribute_window_arrangement: Each side has five large, rectangular windows evenly spaced, with a smaller window at the front for the driver and a possible entry door window; windows are framed in black.
